title: Add a failure and SLA notification callback
description: Steps to wire on-failure and SLA-miss callbacks that alert with run context while suppressing transient-retry noise.
body: Use when a pipeline's failures currently go unnoticed. Do not alert on every retry attempt — engineers tune out a noisy channel. Actions: attach an on-failure callback that fires only on final failure (after retries) with the DAG, task, execution date, and log link, add an SLA-miss callback for the critical task, and route both to an actionable channel. Validation signals include a final-failure alert with full context and no page for a transient retry that later succeeded. Risk boundary: missing alerts let bad data flow downstream while no one is paged; if a critical task has no notification, treat it as an operational gap and escalate to wire one before depending on the pipeline.
